final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing traditional Chinese gongbi (工笔重彩) painting illustration of "百鸟朝凤图" — a hundred birds paying homage to the phoenix — rendered as a grand panoramic scroll composition.

Style/medium: Chinese traditional gongbi (工笔重彩) fine-line polychrome painting, meticulous brushwork with rich mineral pigments and gold powder detailing, in the tradition of classical Song and Ming dynasty court bird-and-flower painting
Composition: panoramic horizontal scroll layout (全景式构图), full scene with layered depth — phoenixes at center commanding the composition, birds distributed across foreground, midground, and background, balanced yet dynamic
Subject: a pair of phoenixes soaring with wings fully spread at the center — the male phoenix (雄凤) with primary plumage in vermillion red, golden yellow, and emerald green; the female phoenix (雌凤) in pink-violet, silver white, and azure blue; the two phoenixes echo each other across swirling clouds and rosy mists. Surrounding them: dozens of rare and auspicious birds — peacock with tail fully fanned open, cranes dancing in flight, golden pheasants foraging, parrots playing — each bird rendered in a distinct, lifelike pose
Scene/backdrop: celestial mountain landscape shrouded in billowing clouds and glowing dawn mists (云蒸霞蔚), ancient pines and emerald cypresses, exotic flowering plants and rare grasses scattered throughout, an immortal paradise realm
Lighting/mood: luminous and ceremonial, suffused with warm golden light filtering through colored clouds, conveying auspiciousness, nobility, and joyous grandeur
Color palette: rich and opulent — vermillion, gold, emerald, pink-violet, azure, and silver white as primary hues; gold powder outlines feather details; deep ink lines anchor the composition; overall palette is saturated and jewel-toned without muddiness
Materials/textures: fine silk or paper ground implied; visible layered mineral pigment washes; gold powder (金粉) used to delineate individual feather barbs and decorative borders; ink outlines (勾线) are precise, fluid, and confident
Constraints: must read as an authentic Chinese gongbi 工笔重彩 scroll painting — not digital concept art, not Western illustration; feather detail must be intricate and botanically/ornithologically plausible; gold accents must feel integrated, not decorative stickers
Avoid: Western watercolor looseness; anime or cartoon stylization; flat vector aesthetic; photorealistic photography; muddy or desaturated color; generic "oriental pattern" clichés; deformed bird anatomy
